assertions.title: Returns null when no recommendations and no insights

steps.action: Render SmartRecommendations with empty modules array, no lastWatched, no streak

evidence.testName: should render null when no recommendations and no insights

assertions.title: Renders 'Continue Where You Left Off' recommendation

steps.action: Set lastWatched module to module[0] at 50% progress, render
steps.expected: Card with ▶️ icon and 'Continue Where You Left Off' text visible
steps.observed: All three elements found in document

evidence.testName: should render "Continue Where You Left Off" card with ▶️ icon when last watched is incomplete

steps.action: Set needingReview to module[1] with confidence 2, render
steps.expected: Card with 🔄 icon, 'Review Low Confidence Module' title, confidence score in description
steps.observed: All elements found: icon, title, 'Day 2: Module 2 (2/5 confidence)' description

evidence.testName: should render "Review Low Confidence Module" card with 🔄 icon and confidence score

steps.action: Set module[0] at 100%, module[1] at 0%, render
steps.expected: Card with 🎯 icon and 'Continue Your Learning Path' for next incomplete module
steps.observed: Icon, title, and 'Start Day 2: Module 2' description all found

evidence.testName: should render "Continue Your Learning Path" card with 🎯 for next incomplete module

steps.action: Set module[0] complete, module[1] at 20%, module[2] at 75%, render
steps.expected: Card with ⚡ icon for module[2] which is >50% complete and not first incomplete
steps.observed: Icon, title, and 'Complete Day 3: Module 3 (75% done)' description all found

evidence.testName: should render "Quick Win Opportunity" card with ⚡ for modules >50% complete

assertions.title: Renders 'Maintain Your Streak' when active and not studied today

steps.action: Set streakInfo with currentStreak=5, lastStudyDate=yesterday, render
steps.expected: Card with 🔥 icon and streak day count message
steps.observed: 'Maintain Your Streak', '🔥', and 'You're on a 5-day streak!' all found

evidence.testName: should render "Maintain Your Streak" card with 🔥 and streak day count

assertions.title: No streak recommendation when already studied today

steps.action: Set streakInfo with lastStudyDate = today (2025-01-15), render

evidence.testName: should not show streak recommendation when already studied today

steps.action: Create scenario with 5+ possible recommendations, render
steps.expected: At most 4 cards shown, first card is 'Continue Where You Left Off' (priority 10)
steps.observed: Cards ≤ 4, first title is 'Continue Where You Left Off', deduplication works (quick-win skipped for already-recommended module)

testNames: should sort recommendations by descending priority and limit to 4
should show at most 4 recommendation cards even when more are available

assertions.title: Deduplicates — same module not shown twice

steps.action: Set module[0] as lastWatched at 60% (also qualifies as quick-win), render
steps.expected: Module 1 appears only once, quick-win skipped for already-recommended module
steps.observed: module1Mentions.length === 1, 'Quick Win Opportunity' not in document

evidence.testName: should not show same module in multiple recommendation cards

steps.action: Click the 'Continue Your Learning Path' recommendation card
steps.expected: onModuleSelect called once with modules[1] (the next incomplete module)

evidence.testName: should call onModuleSelect with correct module when card clicked

assertions.title: Correct cursor style per card type

steps.action: Render with module-backed recommendations, check cursor style on all cards

testNames: should set pointer cursor for cards with a module
should set default cursor for cards without a module reference

steps.expected: Correct insight message and emoji for each threshold
steps.observed: >75%: 'almost there' with 🌟, >50%: 'over half' with 💪, >25%: 'momentum' with 📚, >0%: 'Good start' with 🚀 — all confirmed

testNames: should show "almost there" insight when completion rate >75%
should show "over half" insight when completion rate >50%
should show "momentum" insight when completion rate >25%
should show "Good start" insight when completion rate >0%

assertions.title: Shows review warning when >5 modules need review

steps.action: Set 6 modules needing review, all modules complete, render
steps.expected: ⚠️ icon with '6 modules marked for review' text

testNames: should show ⚠️ warning when more than 5 modules need review
should not show review warning when 5 or fewer modules need review

assertions.title: Shows goal deadline insight when ending within 3 days

steps.action: Set learning-goals with endDate 2 days from now, render
steps.observed: '⏰' and 'Your goal ends in 2 days. Time to push for the finish!' found

testNames: should show ⏰ goal deadline insight when goal ends within 3 days
should not show goal deadline insight when goal ends in more than 3 days
should not show goal deadline insight when no current goal exists

steps.action: Set localStorage 'learning-goals' to invalid JSON string, render
steps.observed: expect(() => render(...)).not.toThrow() passed, 'Recommended For You' heading found

evidence.testName: should handle corrupted learning-goals localStorage data without crashing

summary: Tested 15 assertions (VAL-SMARTREC-001 through VAL-SMARTREC-015): all 15 passed. SmartRecommendations test suite has 31 tests total (15 covering assertions + 16 additional edge-case tests). Full suite of 426 tests across 19 test suites passes with no regressions.
